channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] JD and Usha Vance welcome a baby boy, the first child born to a sitting VP in more than 150 years
item.description: Vice President JD Vance and his wife, second lady Usha Vance, on Sunday announced the birth of their fourth child, the first born to a sitting vice president in more than 150 years.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Ukraine reports multiple deaths after ballistic missile, drone attacks from Russia
item.description: Russia fired two missiles and 94 long-range strike drones at the territory of Ukraine overnight, according to Ukraine’s air force.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Gas prices hit average of $4 a gallon amid renewed US-Iran attacks
item.description: U.S. gas prices jumped to an average of $4 a gallon again Monday as the U.S. and Iran launched more attacks.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] US soldiers killed in Iranian attacks were from Hawaii and Texas
item.description: The US has identified the soldiers killed in Iranian attacks on an American base in Jordan as 1st Lt. Tyler James Feehan, 25, of Ewa Beach, Hawaii and Pvt. Isabella Gonzales, 19, of Carrollton, Texas.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Andy Burnham officially takes over as Britain's prime minister
item.description: After weeks as leader-in-waiting, Andy Burnham officially became prime minister on Monday during a meeting with King Charles III at Buckingham Palace.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Susan Solves It: Million-dollar starters
item.description: Tampa Bay 28 Reporter Susan El Khoury advises buyers to compare multiple markets and watch inventory trends as housing conditions slowly improve in some areas.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] News to Know for July 20
item.description: Florida's Back-to-School Sales Tax Holiday begins today. Plus, local fans celebrate Spain's World Cup victory.

item.title: [WATCHLIST: tropical storm] [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Tropical Depression Two expected to become tropical storm Monday
item.description: Tropical Depression Two continues to organize in the Gulf and is expected to strengthen into a tropical storm later Monday as it tracks near Florida's northern Gulf Coast over the next several days.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Former Scouts fight proposed sale of 604 acres at Sand Hill Scout Reservation
item.description: For generations, Sand Hill Reservation has served as a destination for camping, hiking and Scout activities in Hernando County. Now, a proposal involving nearly half of the property has former Scouts fighting to preserve a place they say helped shape their lives.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] North Port lifts burn ban while water restrictions remain in effect
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Mom dies saving son, 4, from Florida river

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] US military identifies 2 soldiers killed in Iranian attack on Jordan as from Texas and Hawaii
item.description: The Trump administration on Monday identified two soldiers killed in action last week as part of the U.S. war with Iran.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Florida's Back-to-School Sales Tax Holiday begins
item.description: Starting Monday, families across Florida can take advantage of the state's Back-to-School Sales Tax Holiday, which runs from July 20 to Aug. 20.
